languages.text: "Хорошо. Если и впрямь в вашем сердце горит огонь веры, готовый выплеснуться очистительным пламенем, найдите Прозревшую, чью стойкость хранит Элана, и следуйте ее указаниям." {n}Звучит короткий щелчок — связь обрывается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Хорошо. Если и впрямь в вашем сердце горит огонь веры, готовый выплеснуться очистительным пламенем, найдите Прозревшую, чью стойкость хранит Элана, и следуйте ее указаниям." {n}Звучит короткий щелчок — связь обрывается.{/n}

languages.text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Хорошо. Если и впрямь в вашем сердце горит огонь веры, готовый выплеснуться очистительным пламенем, найдите Прозревшую, чью стойкость хранит Элана, и следуйте ее указаниям." {n}Звучит короткий щелчок — связь обрывается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

"Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

"Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

languages.text: “很好。若信仰之火真的在你心中燃烧，并已准备好迸发为净化的烈焰，那就去寻找由埃拉娜守护着的、心志坚定的‘得救之人’，并按照她的指示行事。”{n}你听到短促的咔哒声，通讯被切断了。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “很好。若信仰之火真的在你心中燃烧，并已准备好迸发为净化的烈焰，那就去寻找由埃拉娜守护着的、心志坚定的‘得救之人’，并按照她的指示行事。”{n}你听到短促的咔哒声，通讯被切断了。{/n}

languages.text: « Très bien. Si la ferveur de la foi brûle véritablement dans votre cœur, prête à laisser jaillir ses flammes purificatrices, trouvez la Rédimée dont Elana préserve la constance et suivez ses instructions. » {n}Vous entendez ensuite un petit clic indiquant que la connexion a été coupée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Très bien. Si la ferveur de la foi brûle véritablement dans votre cœur, prête à laisser jaillir ses flammes purificatrices, trouvez la Rédimée dont Elana préserve la constance et suivez ses instructions. » {n}Vous entendez ensuite un petit clic indiquant que la connexion a été coupée.{/n}

languages.text: "Pekâlâ. İnancın ateşi kalbinizde gerçekten yanıyorsa, arındırıcı alevlerle fışkırmaya hazırsa Elana'nın sarsılmazlığını koruyan Kurtarılmışlar'ı bulun ve talimatlarına uyun." {n}Kısa bir tıklama duyuyorsun. Bağlantı kesiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ. İnancın ateşi kalbinizde gerçekten yanıyorsa, arındırıcı alevlerle fışkırmaya hazırsa Elana'nın sarsılmazlığını koruyan Kurtarılmışlar'ı bulun ve talimatlarına uyun." {n}Kısa bir tıklama duyuyorsun. Bağlantı kesiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Muy bien. Si de verdad lleva en su corazón el fuego de la fe y quiere convertirlo en una llama purificadora, encuentre a la Redimida cuya fidelidad protege Elana y siga sus instrucciones». {n}Oyes un breve clic: la conexión se ha interrumpido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Muy bien. Si de verdad lleva en su corazón el fuego de la fe y quiere convertirlo en una llama purificadora, encuentre a la Redimida cuya fidelidad protege Elana y siga sus instrucciones». {n}Oyes un breve clic: la conexión se ha interrumpido.{/n}

languages.text: "Also schön. Falls das Feuer des Glaubens wirklich in Eurem Herzen brennt und als reinigende Flamme zutage treten will, dann findet die Erlöste, deren Standhaftigkeit Elana bewahrt, und befolgt ihre Anweisungen." {n}Du hörst ein kurzes Klicken, als die Verbindung getrennt wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Also schön. Falls das Feuer des Glaubens wirklich in Eurem Herzen brennt und als reinigende Flamme zutage treten will, dann findet die Erlöste, deren Standhaftigkeit Elana bewahrt, und befolgt ihre Anweisungen." {n}Du hörst ein kurzes Klicken, als die Verbindung getrennt wird.{/n}

languages.text: 「よし、信仰の火が心の中で燃え、清められる炎を放つ準備ができているのなら、エレーナが守る堅実な救済者を見つけ、彼女の指示に従え。」{n}短いクリック音が聞こえる―接続が切れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Very well. If the fire of faith truly burns in your heart, primed to burst forth in cleansing flame, find the Redeemed whose steadfastness Elana preserves, and follow her instructions." {n}You hear a short click — the connection has been cut off.{/n}
